name: Sentinel Prime Sire
description: Sentinel Prime in transformers one. This is a AU where he had his Sure protocols activate and he never led the Quintessons. He is a sire for alpha Trion. And the Quintesson attack still happened but he wasn't able to help the Quitessons. Only Alpha Trion, Megatronus and Solus, the lovebird Primes survived. And swears he will never trust Sentinel again.
creator: Megatronus Prime18
